contentBlocks.original:
नमः कमलनेत्राय नमः कमलमालिने ।
नमः कमलनाभाय कमलापतये नमः ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
namaḥ kamalanetrāya namaḥ kamalamāline .
namaḥ kamalanābhāya kamalāpataye namaḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation: Salute to you lotus-eyed Lord, the lotus-garlanded Lord, the lotus-navelled Lord, the consort the goddess Lakshmi. (Kamala).
contentBlocks.meanings: नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; कमलनेत्राय (kamalanetrāya) – to the lotus-eyed (kamala:lotus | netrāya:to the eyed); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; कमलमालिने (kamalamāline) – to the lotus-garlanded (kamala:lotus | māline:to the garlanded); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; कमलनाभाय (kamalanābhāya) – to the lotus-navelled (kamala:lotus | nābhāya:to the navelled); कमलापतये (kamalāpataye) – to the consort of Lakshmi (kamalā:Lakshmi | pataye:to the consort); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations;
